name: Stuffed Lamb Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a pocket in the thickest part of the chop.
2. Cream together remaining ingredients, adding salt and pepper to taste.
3. Insert mixture into the pocket; secure chops with toothpicks.
4. Broil for 8 minutes for rare, 14 minutes for medium rare, or 18 minutes for medium.
Variations: Omit parsley, add tarragon or rosemary.
